meta.source_dataset: hakunamatata1997/Layoffs_Data (scraped from Layoffs.fyi; snapshot last updated >1 year ago on Hugging Face)
notes: Per-company totals are computed by summing Laid_Off_Count across all layoff events for each company in the dataset snapshot.
This dataset snapshot ends on 2024-05-24, so per-company totals DO NOT include events after that date (including many 2024 H2, 2025, and 2026 layoffs).
The 'overall_year_totals_from_layoffs_fyi' values are taken from the Layoffs.fyi homepage and include full-year totals (or YTD for 2026).
Job titles and years-of-experience are generally not included in public layoff trackers; they are not present in this dataset.
